Name: Ray Tracing
Description: Covers parameters relating to ray tracing.

Fields.Name: Enable Directional Light Shadow
Fields.Description: Enables ray-traced shadows for directional lights, providing more accurate and realistic shadowing.

Fields.Name: Enable Ambient Occlusion
Fields.Description: Enables ray-traced ambient occlusion for improved contact shadows and depth perception.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow : Ray Sample Count
Fields.Description: Number of rays cast per pixel for directional light shadow calculation. Higher values improve quality but reduce performance.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Minimum Ray Length
Fields.Description: Minimum distance that shadow rays will travel when tracing directional light shadows.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow : MaximumRay Length
Fields.Description: Maximum distance that shadow rays will travel when tracing directional light shadows.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Enable Ray Alpha
Fields.Description: Allows shadow rays to account for alpha-tested or transparent geometry during intersection tests.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Cone Radius
Fields.Description: Defines the cone radius for soft shadow sampling, simulating area light effects for softer shadow edges.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Adjust Ray Start Position
Fields.Description: Offsets the starting position of shadow rays to reduce self-intersection artifacts such as shadow spots.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Enable Denoise Post Process
Fields.Description: Enables denoising of ray-traced shadow results to reduce noise from limited sample counts.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Post Process Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Controls temporal accumulation weight for denoising, balancing stability versus responsiveness.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Composite Fade Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which ray-traced shadows begin blending with other shadowing methods.

Fields.Name: Directional Light Shadow: Composite Fade Range Distance
Fields.Description: Distance range over which ray-traced shadows fully fade out or transition to alternative techniques.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Ray Sample Count
Fields.Description: Number of rays cast per pixel for ambient occlusion. Higher values improve accuracy but increase cost.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Minimum Ray Length
Fields.Description: Minimum ray length used when sampling ambient occlusion, controlling near-surface shadowing.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Maximum Ray Length
Fields.Description: Maximum ray length for ambient occlusion sampling, affecting how far occlusion is considered.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Enable Ray Alpha
Fields.Description: Enables occlusion rays to consider alpha-tested or transparent geometry.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the overall intensity of ambient occlusion effect.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Offset
Fields.Description: Bias applied to ambient occlusion to reduce self-shadowing artifacts.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Enable Denoise Post Process
Fields.Description: Enables denoising of ray-traced ambient occlusion to reduce noise artifacts.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Post Process Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Controls temporal accumulation strength for ambient occlusion denoising.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Post Process Atrous Filter Steps
Fields.Description: Number of iterations used in the Atrous filter for spatial denoising of ambient occlusion.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Composite Fade Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which ray-traced ambient occlusion begins to fade out.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Composite Fade Range Distance
Fields.Description: Distance range over which ambient occlusion fully fades out or blends with other techniques.
